articles.title: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
articles.summary: Four astronauts splashed down in the Pacific after a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans.

articles.summary: Police fatally shot the assailant after he ignored at least 20 demands to drop the weapon, said NYPD.
